title: conyza setulosa
intro: Conyza setulosa, also known as hairy fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of essential oils such as thymol and camphor. The medicinal properties of Conyza setulosa provide various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Conyza setulosa can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
